title: Fictional Sewing Capture Session
text: A fabricated capture session demonstrates how physical-process evidence can be packaged with provenance, limitations, and validation scope. It is not real robot or machine data.

title: Fictional Source Embodiment
text: The source embodiment is a fictional tabletop sewing fixture. The description is only sufficient to identify the example context, not to control or simulate a machine.

title: Transfer Claim and Validation Scope
text: The example claim level is evidence_for_adaptation with validation limited to source_hardware_only. It does not guarantee transfer, define executable control, or certify safety.

known_non_claims: Does not define executable robot control

title: Non-Executable Policy Metadata
text: The pack includes policy metadata only. No model weights, executable code, runtime, action schema, or control policy is provided.

title: Known Limitations and Non-Claims
text: This example is not validated on real hardware, different machines, different material classes, or unsupervised operation. It is illustrative evidence packaging only.
